speaker: MATT
raw_text: I was hoping it would bother you for the rest of the game. So, that being the case, we're jumping right into battle at the top of this game in the center of this beach-side cavern. Roll initiative, everybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right in. We have a good number of the party that is still out in the boat that is being towed by Keyleth, currently in shark form.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm in a boat. I'm in a motherfucking boat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right there. So in the cavern, I believe we had Vax, we had Scanlan. Tiberius and Vex on the flying carpet and are making their way down. You scouted ahead and began to check the interior before this happened. So, these creatures are now rising up off the ground, looking insidious in their expression, all glaring at you, as you're the most apparently-nearby individual. What are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You have fuzz in your hair.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No you got it. It's gone.
